economic_notes: Nation has investments in construction (Stqo:ya Construction LP), development (Sqewqel Development Corporation LLP), and gas bar (Sqewqel Gas Bar LLP) partnerships. Combined revenue of business partnerships was $32,734,261 in 2022. New Prospera Credit Union loans totaling ~$6.98M secured by commercial properties in Agassiz BC.
notes: Fiscal year end March 31, 2022. Four entities fully consolidated: Seabird Education Society, Seabird Island Holdings Ltd., Seabird Island Forestry Company Ltd., Seabird Island Forestry Limited Partnership. Five entities accounted for by modified equity method (GBEs): Stqo:ya Construction Ltd., Stqo:ya Construction LP, Sqewqel Development LLP, Sqewqel Gas Bar LLP, Sqewqel Development Corporation. Large increase in long-term debt from ~$6.1M to ~$15.7M due to new Bank of Montreal and Prospera Credit Union loans. Significant new deferred revenue of $6.17M appeared in 2022 (was $0 in 2021). No remuneration schedule included in the provided financial statements. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $14,337,307 + Other government per segmented schedule $15,019,726 = $29,357,033. OSR = total revenue $38,239,436 minus total government transfers $29,357,033 = $8,882,403.
